sections.paragraph:
verb לעבוד

to work, labor; have a job; till; serve; worship; (Slang) put someone on, "do", "fix", cheat

verb לעבד

to cultivate; process; adapt

verb להעביד

to cause to work; enslave; to employ

verb הועבד

be forced to work; enslaved

verb לעבד (>>עיבד)

to cultivate; process; adapt

masculine noun

slave, servile, serf, servant, thrall, bondman, bondsman
